faq.question: How do I register for an event?
faq.answer: To register for an event, navigate to the Events page, click on the event card, and follow the booking instructions. You must be logged in to complete a booking.

faq.question: Can I cancel my event booking?
faq.answer: Yes. Visit your Profile page, go to the Bookings tab, and select Cancel next to the event. Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the event start time.

faq.question: When is the next community event?
faq.answer: Upcoming events are listed on the Events page. The schedule is updated regularly, so check back often for new additions.

faq.question: How do I access community services?
faq.answer: Navigate to the Services page to browse available services such as waste collection, permits, and rates enquiries. Each service has its own request or information form.

faq.question: How long does garbage collection take?
faq.answer: Garbage collection typically occurs on a weekly basis. Schedules may vary by suburb. Check your local area details on the Waste Collection service page.

faq.question: How do I submit a service request?
faq.answer: Go to Services, select the relevant service, and complete the online request form. You will receive a confirmation once your request has been received.

faq.question: How do I create an account?
faq.answer: Click Sign Up in the top navigation bar and fill in your name, email address, and password. Your account will be created immediately.

faq.question: How do I update my profile information?
faq.answer: Log in and click your name in the navbar to go to your Profile page. You can edit your name, email, phone number, and address from there.

faq.question: I forgot my password. What do I do?
faq.answer: On the Login page, click Forgot Password and enter your registered email. A reset link will be sent to your inbox within a few minutes.

faq.question: How do I provide feedback?
faq.answer: Visit the Feedback page, select a category, rate your experience, and write your comments. Feedback is reviewed by our team and helps improve our services.

faq.question: How do I report a portal issue?
faq.answer: Use the Contact Us page to report technical issues. Please include as much detail as possible — screenshots are helpful — so our team can resolve the issue quickly.

faq.question: How long does it take to get a response?
faq.answer: We aim to respond to all enquiries within 2 business days. Urgent matters can be escalated by phone during business hours.
